rag_rules: Use annex agree {** ... **}; in component type for assumptions and guarantees, in implementation for assignments only.
Place guarantees in component type scope only when relating visible inputs to visible outputs with concrete bounds or named constants.
Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Restrict AGREE expressions to identifiers explicitly visible in the current component scope.
Do not assume AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) are automatically accessible as variables in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Syntax: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; assign output = expression; const name : type = value;
Component type annexes: assume/guarantee/const/equation; implementation annexes: assign only.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-only names in component type annex guarantees.
irrelevant_topics: assume/guarantee placement decision for current requirement
